summary: Iteration 25: Contract System Testing - All backend and frontend features verified. 16 backend tests passed. Frontend contract view, signature modal, and Contrat button on reservations all working correctly.

POST /api/admin/contracts/generate.details: Creates contract with FR or EN language, returns contract_id. Updates existing contract if one exists for reservation.

GET /api/contracts/{id}.details: Returns complete contract with all fields: id, reservation_id, status, language, signature_client, contract_data

GET /api/contracts/by-reservation/{reser.details: Returns contract for specific reservation, 404 if none exists

PUT /api/contracts/{id}/send.details: Updates status to 'sent', creates notification for client

PUT /api/contracts/{id}/sign.details: Accepts signature_data base64, updates status to 'signed', stores signature_date. Returns 400 for already signed contracts

GET /api/contracts/{id}/pdf.details: Generates valid PDF binary (starts with %PDF header), Content-Type: application/pdf

GET /api/admin/contracts.details: Lists all contracts for agency, sorted by created_at desc

contract_view_page_sections.details: All 7 sections visible: 1.Tenant Info, 2.Vehicle, 3.Price, 4.Deposit, 5.Insurance, 6.Debt, 7.Jurisdiction. Plus General Conditions section.

contract_signed_badge.details: 'Signé' badge shown with green checkmark when contract status=signed

sign_button_visibility.details: 'Signer le contrat' button visible only when status=sent

signature_canvas_modal.details: Modal opens on Sign button click, contains HTML5 canvas, 'Effacer' clear button, 'Confirmer la signature' submit button

signature_canvas_drawing.details: Canvas accepts mouse/touch drawing input, Confirm button enabled after drawing

contrat_button_reservations.details: Each reservation card has 'Contrat' button with document-text icon in card footer

download_pdf_button.details: 'Télécharger PDF' / 'Download PDF' button visible at bottom of contract page

language_support.details: Contract displays in FR or EN based on language field. Template text changes accordingly.

seed_data_creation: Created/updated contracts during testing: 3bc6d869 (EN), 889e73f1 (FR signed), 89cd20f3 (signed via UI test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract system fully functional. Status flow: draft -> sent -> signed. Sign button only appears when status=sent. Signature uses HTML5 canvas on web. PDF generation uses reportlab. Contract data is stored in MongoDB 'contracts' collection. Frontend route is /contract/{id}. Admin reserves can use 'Contrat' button (uses window.prompt for language selection).
